testcase.name: test_verified_feed

failure.message: AssertionError: 1 untrusted hosts: [('Vice President for Finance and Administration', 'cuny.jobs')] assert not [('Vice President for Finance and Administration', 'cuny.jobs')]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_27_deep_search_auth.py:188: in test_verified_feed assert not untrusted, f"{len(untrusted)} untrusted hosts: {untrusted[:5]}" E AssertionError: 1 untrusted hosts: [('Vice President for Finance and Administration', 'cuny.jobs')] E assert not [('Vice President for Finance and Administration', 'cuny.jobs')]
